docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-20-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-20-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF IAN DEROUIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISAMARIE INESI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DEROUIN, IAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INESI, LISAMARIE $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,075.00, BREACH OF PROMISSORY NOTE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-20-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF IAN DEROUIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LISAMARIE INESI IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. DEFENDANT RETAINS THEIR RIGHT TO SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
